summary: Completed testing of Cliente Custom Fields feature (FASE 1). Backend CRUD APIs all working (16/16 tests passed). Frontend admin UI for managing custom fields working. Custom fields appear correctly in EditClienteModal with 'Campi Aggiuntivi' section showing required field indicator.

minor.issue: ClienteUpdate model requires 'email' field even for partial updates - should make all fields optional for PATCH-like behavior

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Backend ClienteUpdate model should have all fields as Optional for true partial update support
seed_data_creation: Created custom field 'Codice Cliente Esterno' for commessa 054aa5b3-3f8c-49b0-b9f0-e96911f3776d + tipologia 919d1ec8-3470-4201-b8a2-c84545112fa3 (Telefonia Vodafone Negozi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom fields feature fully implemented and tested. Backend CRUD at /api/cliente-custom-fields works. Frontend admin page at 'Campi Clienti' sidebar menu. Custom fields render in EditClienteModal under 'Campi Aggiuntivi' section. ViewClienteModal should show custom fields in 'custom-fields-view-section' but needs scroll to verify. CreateClienteModal custom fields appear after completing cascading filiera selection.

backend.POST /api/cliente-custom-fields: PASS - Admin can create, non-admin gets 403
backend.GET /api/cliente-custom-fields: PASS - Filters by commessa_id and tipologia_contratto_id work
backend.PUT /api/cliente-custom-fields/{id}: PASS - Partial update works, invalid field_type rejected
backend.dati_aggiuntivi in cliente: PASS - Can save and read custom field values

frontend.select type with options: PASS - Options input appears for select/multi_select
frontend.custom-field-row-{id}: PASS - Created fields appear in list
frontend.EditClienteModal custom fields: PASS - 'Campi Aggiuntivi' section shows with required indicator
frontend.ViewClienteModal custom fields: PARTIAL - Modal opens but custom-fields-view-section needs verification
frontend.CreateClienteModal custom fields: NOT TESTED - Requires completing full cascading filiera selection
